channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Russell puts Mercedes on pole at Las Vegas and Verstappen nips Norris in championship battle
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — George Russell put Mercedes on the pole for the Las Vegas Grand Prix in an upset over teammate Lewis Hamilton, who had been considered the favorite but struggled in Friday night's final qualifying session.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jai'Den Thomas leads No. 23 UNLV to a 27-16 victory over San Jose State
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Jai'Den Thomas ran for 135 yards and the go-ahead touchdown in the third quarter to help No. 23 UNLV keep its conference title hopes alive with a 27-16 victory over San Jose State on Friday night. The Rebels (9-2, 5-1 Mountain West, No.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Caprock Academy Hockey plays first ever varsity game
item.description: The Caprock Academy Eagles -- featuring players from all five Valley schools (Grand Junction, Palisade, Fruita, Central and Caprock) -- kicked off their inaugural varsity season at the Jorgensen Event Center in Gunnison against Colorado Academy.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: LaVine, Dosunmu and White power the Bulls to a 136-122 win over the Hawks
item.description: Zach LaVine scored 26 points, Ayo Dosunmu and Coby White each had 20 and the Chicago Bulls beat the Atlanta Hawks 136-122 on Friday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SF Giants avoid arbitration with all five non-tender candidates
item.description: The Giants announced on Friday that they've agreed to one-year deals with Mike Yastrzemski and Austin Warren, as well as tendered contracts to Tyler Rogers, Camilo Doval and LaMonte Wade Jr
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Girls Catholic school volleyball team could face penalty after fans boo trans athlete on public school team
item.description: A transgender volleyball player at a high school in northern California was reportedly booed and harassed during a match against a Catholic school Oct. 12.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Angel Yin rides a hot putter to 2-shot lead in LPGA finale
item.description: NAPLES, Fla. (AP) — Angel Yin rammed in a 30-foot par putt on her opening hole, setting the tone for a day of big putts and 3-under 69 that gave her a two-shot lead Friday in the CME Group Tour Championship and the chase for the $4 million prize.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 76ers center Joel Embiid sidelined due to swelling in his left knee and will miss two games
item.description: The Philadelphia 76ers say center Joel Embiid is managing swelling in his left knee and will miss a second consecutive game Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Alex Ovechkin's quest to break Wayne Gretzky's coveted NHL record on hold after brutal injury
item.description: Alex Ovechkin was on pace to become the NHL's all-time leading goal scorer this season, but a broken fibula has put his quest for history on hold.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alyssa Nakken, first full-time female coach in MLB history, leaving Giants to join Guardians
item.description: Alyssa Nakken, the first woman to coach in an MLB game, is leaving the San Francisco Giants to join the Cleveland Guardians.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Caitlin Clark to join Cincinnati bid for 16th National Women's Soccer League team
item.description: WNBA star Caitlin Clark has joined Cincinnati's bid for a National Women's Soccer League expansion team. Major League Soccer's FC Cincinnati heads the group trying to bring a women's pro team to the city.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boston shuts out Utah Hockey Club, 1-0
item.description: BOSTON (ABC4 Sports) - For the fifth time this season, the Utah Hockey Club failed to score a single goal. Joonas Korpisalo made 21 saves for the Boston Bruins in a 1-0 win against the Utah Hockey Club at TD Garden on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Cubs trade for Cleveland reliever Eli Morgan; Wisdom DFA'd
item.description: CLEVELAND, Ind. — The Cubs are trading for Cleveland relief pitcher Eli Morgan. As a result of adding Morgan to the 40-man, Patrick Wisdom was designated for assignment. Morgan, 28, had the best season of his career in 2024 with a 1.93 ERA with Cleveland in 42 innings.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Brayden Point's OT winner helps Lightning rally past Penguins, 3-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored at 3:58 of overtime and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Pittsburgh Penguins 3-2 on Tuesday night. Point’s overtime winner was his 10th goal of the season. Anthony Cirelli scored his fifth goal of the season. Andrei Vasilevskiy stopped 17 shots for Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: USU seeks to overturn loss in forfeited volleyball game against San Jose State
item.description: Just hours after Utah lawmakers urged Utah State University to join a Title IX lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference, the Logan-based school filed a motion to join the lawsuit, in part.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Jets fire general manager Joe Douglas after team goes 3-8 to start the season: AP source
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The New York Jets have fired general manager Joe Douglas, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Tuesday. Douglas was in the final year of his contract after being hired in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: BYU still controls own destiny for Big 12 Championship
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is in a position it hasn't been in all season long -- trying to bounce back from a loss. The Cougars suffered their first defeat of the season Saturday night, a disappointing 17-13 loss to Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Jake Paul, 27, beats 58-year-old Mike Tyson as the hits don't match the hype
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The boos from a crowd wanting more action were growing again when Jake Paul dropped his gloves before the final bell and bowed toward 58-year-old Mike Tyson.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Thousands of Netflix users report outages during Tyson-Paul boxing match
item.description: Just as thousands of Netflix users flocked to the app to stream Friday night's head-to-head boxing match between champion Mike Tyson and YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul, the stream crashed.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, WGN 9
